title: glycosmis macrocarpa
intro: Glycosmis macrocarpa, also known as the 'Australian Prickly Ash' or 'New Guinea Prickly Ash', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of essential oils and flavonoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Glycosmis macrocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Glycosmis macrocarpa can be found in various forms, including essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
